news.headline: Southwest Airlines will discuss Q3 2024 financial results on Oct 24, 2024, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time with President & CEO.
news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) is providing an opportunity to tune into a live webcast of its financial results for the second quarter of 2024. The event is scheduled for Thursday, October 24, 2024, at 12:30 PM Eastern Time. Bob Jordan, the President and Chief Executive of Southwest Airlines Co., will be leading the webcast. This invitation offers investors and interested individuals valuable insights into the company's performance during this period.

news.headline: Olympus Corp of the Americas receives top rating on Disability Equality Index by Disability:IN in 2024.
news.summary: Olympus Corporation of the Americas, based in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, disclosed on October 23, 2024, that it has achieved a top rating on the workplace disability index. The company, a prominent player in medical technology, received recognition from Disability:IN® as a standout performer in this area. This demonstrates Olympus Corp. of the Americas' commitment to creating an inclusive workplace environment. The specific ranking or score was not provided in the announcement.

news.headline: J.S. Held and Ocean Tomo welcome David Kennedy and Larry Tedesco to their IP practice after 50 years.
news.summary: In Jericho, New York on October 23, 2024, global consulting firm J.S. Held marked its 50th anniversary by announcing the addition of David Kennedy and Larry Tedesco to their intellectual property (IP) practice in partnership with Ocean Tomo. These industry experts will contribute their expertise to further strengthen the IP team at J.S. Held as it continues to grow and evolve.

news.headline: Nanit CEO Anushka Salinas strengthens leadership team to support growth. Celebrating 10th anniversary after 10 years.
news.summary: Nanit, a leading smart baby monitoring company, marked its 10th anniversary in New York on October 23, 2024. CEO Anushka Salinas, who has been in the role for six months, revealed new executive appointments to reinforce Nanit's dedication to revolutionizing smart parenting. The company is focused on enhancing its impact on the industry as it reaches this milestone.

news.headline: BoneFoam launches Guardian Patient Protection Solutions to reduce hospital-acquired injuries; new portfolio includes modern single-use solutions.
news.summary: CORCORAN, Minn. - On October 23, 2024, BoneFoam, Inc. introduced a range of cutting-edge patient protection products to enhance safety in healthcare settings. These single-use solutions are designed to decrease common hospital-acquired injuries through standardized and consistent practices. The company's latest portfolio focuses on reducing prevalent patient injuries, showcasing their commitment to improving healthcare outcomes.

news.headline: Nigeria drops money laundering charges against Binance exec after diplomatic pressure. Exec was detained since April. Cleared of tax evasion charges in June.
news.summary: The Nigerian government has dropped all money laundering charges against Binance executive Tigran Gambaryan, who had been detained since April. This development was disclosed by a representative of the Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) during a hearing at a Federal High Court in Abuja. Gambaryan, who was arrested in February alongside colleague Nadeem Anjarwalla while in Nigeria, was in custody at Kuje Correctional Center even after Anjarwalla escaped. The charges initially included money laundering and tax evasion allegations, with tax evasion charges being dismissed in June. This week's resolution addressed the remaining money laundering accusations. The case sparked diplomatic discussions.

news.headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Q3: Revenue decline of 3.0% to $1.470 billion, EPS $1.43 (missing consensus $1.47). LTL tons per day down 4.8%.
news.summary: Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (NASDAQ: ODFL) saw a drop in shares after releasing their third-quarter results. Their revenue decreased by 3.0% year-over-year to $1.470 billion, falling short of the expected $1.492 billion. Earnings per share (EPS) were $1.43, missing the anticipated $1.47. The decrease in revenue was mainly due to a 4.8% reduction in less-than-truckload (LTL) tons per day, partially offset by a 1.5% increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight. The drop in LTL tons per day was caused by a 3.4% decrease in LTL shipments per day and a 1.4% decline in LTL weight per shipment. LTL revenue per hundredweight, excluding fuel surcharges, increased by 4.6%.

news.headline: World's first subzero organ transports completed with pig kidneys between Baltimore and Innsbruck, 48-hour journeys made 5 times using X-Therma's technology.
news.summary: In an unprecedented achievement, surgeons have completed five successful transcontinental transports of pig kidneys between Baltimore and Innsbruck utilizing X-Therma's FDA Breakthrough-designated subzero preservation technology. This groundbreaking feat marks the first time a pig kidney preserved at subzero temperatures has been transported between the two cities. The innovative preservation technology employed in these operations showcases the potential for advancements in organ transportation and could revolutionize the field of organ transplantation. This milestone underscores the significant progress made in organ preservation methods, potentially increasing the accessibility and viability of organ transplants for patients in need.

news.headline: Colossal provides $1M grant to Baby2Baby for hurricane relief efforts for children and families.
news.summary: Colossal has raised significant funds, with a grant from DTCare, to aid a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization assisting children and families affected by hurricanes Helene and Milton. The support comes as a response to the recent disasters. The funds will be used to provide relief and aid in the recovery efforts. The contribution is crucial in addressing the needs of those impacted by the hurricanes. The grant comes at a crucial time as the nonprofit works tirelessly to provide assistance to those affected. This initiative aims to bring hope and help to the communities facing the aftermath of the natural disasters.

news.headline: Denmark's first AI supercomputer "Gefion" operational, built on NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD, enhancing research opportunities.
news.summary: A cutting-edge supercomputer called "Gefion" has been established in Copenhagen, Denmark on October 23, 2024. This state-of-the-art AI supercomputer, constructed using the powerful NVIDIA DGX SuperPOD technology, is poised to significantly boost research efforts and open up fresh avenues for academia and industry. The launch event marked the introduction of this advanced computing system, with its high-performance capabilities expected to enhance technological advancements and facilitate innovation.

news.headline: Florida attorney Julie Rountree transitions from family law to divorce coaching after 15 years, opens Divorce Coaching Solutions.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on October 23, 2024, Julie Rountree, a former family law attorney with over 15 years of experience, has made a transition from legal practice to providing emotional support. Her new venture, Divorce Coaching Solutions, aims to assist individuals navigating difficult life transitions. This shift in focus marks a significant change in her career path, where she hopes to leverage her expertise in emotional support beyond the confines of the courtroom.

news.headline: InMoment launches AI-powered Active Listening Agents for surveys to enhance feedback collection with follow-up questions.
news.summary: In Salt Lake City, InMoment® has launched AI-powered Active Listening Agents, an enhanced version of its Active Listening feature. The new feature utilizes generative AI to prompt users with context-specific follow-up questions, encouraging more detailed real-time responses. This update aims to enhance feedback collection, offering a more interactive experience. With this release, InMoment continues to lead in Experience Improvement (XI)™ solutions.

news.headline: NCEA report discusses pathways to preserve US dominance in global LNG exports, recommends three strategies. Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: In Washington on October 23, 2024, the National Center for Energy Analytics (NCEA) released a report by Senior Fellow Tristan Abbey discussing the politicization of liquid natural gas (LNG) exports. The report suggests three strategies to guarantee the U.S. sustains or increases its LNG exports.

news.headline: Quorum updates PAC management software with comprehensive upgrades, improving compliance and fundraising.
news.summary: Revolutionary PAC management software by Quorum, a prominent public affairs software company, has been bolstered with a range of new features to streamline compliance, fundraising, and reporting. The enhancements to Quorum PAC were unveiled on October 23, 2024, in Washington. This software is designed to assist political action committees in efficiently managing their operations.

news.headline: NFL and Remezcla Media Group partner to expand Hispanic audience and sponsorships. Oct 23, 2024.
news.summary: A recent collaboration aims to expand the NFL's Hispanic fan base and sponsorship opportunities by leveraging Remezcla's acclaimed storytelling skills and diverse sales and marketing knowledge. This strategic partnership was announced on October 23, 2024, in New York City, with the NFL seeking to tap into Remezcla's expertise to enhance its presence within the Hispanic community. This alliance is expected to boost engagement with Hispanic audiences and drive increased sponsorship revenue for the NFL.

news.headline: Bi-metal band saw blade market to reach $1939.3 million by 2939 with a CAGR of 4.9% - Valuates Reports.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, as of October 23, 2024, the Bi-Metal Band Saw Blade Market is experiencing growth with segmentation by type including High Speed Steel Band Saw Blade, Carbide Band Saw Blade, and Emery Band Saw Blade. The market is further segmented by applications such as the Ferrous metallurgy industry, Machining, Automobile industry, and Aviation. This presents a global opportunity for growth and development in this industry.

news.headline: AfroTech Conference 2024 in Houston features T.I., Colin Kaepernick, Kendrick Sampson, and Angelica Ross as keynote speakers, highlighting Black voices and innovation.
news.summary: Los Angeles will host a captivating event on October 23, 2024, where Black voices will be amplified and innovation will be celebrated. Blavity, Inc., a leading digital media company renowned for platforms like Blavity, 21Ninety, Home & Texture, and AfroTech, will present a lineup merging culture and technology. This event promises to inspire the next generation of innovators. Stay tuned to witness this impactful gathering showcasing the powerful intersection of culture and technology.

news.headline: MSM introduces FertilityEquity™ e-Learning program to address disparities in fertility care for Black women, supported by Ferring Pharmaceuticals.
news.summary: The Morehouse School of Medicine (MSM) in Atlanta, in collaboration with Ferring Pharmaceuticals, has launched the FertilityEquity™ e-Learning modules, using EngagedMD technology. This initiative aims to promote equity in fertility care for Black women by providing education and practical training for healthcare providers and fertility clinic personnel. Despite the common goal of starting families, Black women often encounter more challenges in this area compared to other demographics.

news.headline: Upwork unveils new changes for growth and beats Q3 2024 financial guidance with strong results. #business #growth #Q3 2024
news.summary: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has fallen to 4.9%, representing a decrease of 0.3% from the previous month. The economy added 250,000 new jobs in a variety of sectors, including manufacturing, healthcare, and technology. Despite this positive trend, experts are concerned about the slowing growth rate in the retail industry, which experienced a decrease of 2.5% in sales compared to the same period last year. The report also highlights the significant impact of inflation, which rose by 2.1% over the last quarter, leading to increased costs for consumers. Overall, the data indicates a mixed economic outlook with some sectors flourishing while others face challenges.

news.headline: Russia’s Putin: Iran has become a fully-fledged member of the BRICS group.
Global cumin ingredients market valued at $1.9 billion in 2023, expected to grow at 4.2% CAGR by 2030.
news.summary: The market for cumin ingredients is experiencing rapid growth, as indicated in a report titled "Global Cumin Ingredients Market 2024 Edition." Valued at USD 1.9 billion in 2023, the market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 4.2% from 2025 to 2030. This growth is primarily attributed to the rising popularity of natural flavors. The market has seen notable advancements, and the demand for cumin ingredients is on the rise, especially for various applications and product types across different regions worldwide.

news.headline: Hightouch launches solution for CTV advertising with unified targeting and measurement capabilities.
news.summary: Hightouch has introduced a new solution on October 23, 2024, in San Francisco, that allows advertisers to effectively target, match, and measure first-party audiences in the complex CTV environment. This initiative aims to simplify and expedite advertising efforts across various CTV platforms, leveraging Hightouch's expertise as a top composable CDP.

news.headline: Securus Technologies donates $25,000 and $135,000 worth of free services for Florida hurricane relief efforts.
news.summary: A leading technology provider, Securus Technologies, under Aventiv Technologies, is striving to uphold communication channels for incarcerated individuals in correctional facilities amidst the recent hurricanes disrupting community infrastructure. This initiative is crucial as the hurricanes have affected numerous regions, causing disruption to vital services. Securus Technologies is dedicated to ensuring that inmates have access to reliable communication services during these challenging times. Founded in 2024, the company has rapidly become a key player in the industry.

news.headline: 5-hour ENERGY® partners with football Superfans to provide energy all season long. FARMINGTON HILLS, Mich., Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: The company has teamed up with legendary football Superfans to provide the necessary energy to match the enthusiasm and passion throughout the entire season. This initiative was announced in Farmington Hills, Michigan on October 23, 2024, through PRNewswire. Football players undoubtedly bring immense energy during the season games, but off the field...

news.headline: Two-thirds of enterprises to integrate AI-powered WEM apps into customer service ops - Frost & Sullivan survey.
news.summary: Early look at Frost & Sullivan's Global CX Survey reveals that 66% of enterprises intend to integrate AI-Powered Workforce Engagement Management (WEM) applications into their customer service operations. This data was gathered from a sneak preview of the survey results in Fairfax County, Va., on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: Coach Bill Self is matching every Boo! Books purchase at local Wendy's up to $30,000 to benefit the Dave Thomas Foundation for Adoption.
news.summary: A celebrated coach from the hall of fame has committed to matching every purchase of Boo! Books at Wendy's stores in the local area, up to $30,000. The initiative aims to support the Dave Thomas Foundation for Adoption. Legacy Restaurant Group (LRG), a franchisee of The Wendy's Company, based in Dublin, Ohio, has partnered with the coach for this cause.

news.headline: Sanjay Singh appointed as CFO at Wellness Pet, bringing 30 years of experience. Company has been a leader in pet nutrition for over 25 years.
news.summary: With almost three decades of experience in retail and consumer finance, Singh joins Wellness Pet to propel the brand's ongoing success and generate long-term value. The announcement was made by Wellness Pet Company in BURLINGTON, Mass. on October 23, 2024. Specializing in pet nutrition for more than 25 years, the company reveals their strategic appointment.

news.headline: Reworld™ joins Halloween event on Oct 26, 2-4 PM in Milwaukee, Villard Ave area; children to participate.
news.summary: A community outreach event is set to take place on Villard Ave between 35th and 37th St in Milwaukee on October 26th, 2024, from 2:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Reworld™ will be participating in the event which aims to bring the community together. During the event, Villard Avenue will be shut down to traffic to create a safe space for children and families to enjoy various activities.

news.headline: TV show "Office Joe" debuts Nov. 8, highlighting veteran challenges. Produced by American Legion, largest veterans organization.
news.summary: "Office Joe," premiering on November 8th, portrays the difficulties veterans encounter as they reintegrate into civilian life. Set in Indianapolis, the show will showcase the modern-day comedy world from The American Legion's perspective. The debut episode will feature an esteemed cast with military backgrounds, providing insight and humor into the challenges faced post-service. This significant event in television history promises to shed light on the experiences of veterans transitioning back into society, captivating audiences with its unique storytelling. Stay tuned for this groundbreaking series as it brings awareness to an important issue affecting countless individuals nationwide.

news.headline: Primestone Partners names Jon Beyman to its Technology Advisory Board, bringing over 40 years of experience.
news.summary: In New York on October 23, 2024, Primestone Partners, a management firm based in the city and specialized in strategic technology investments, revealed the addition of Jon Beyman to its Technology Advisory Board. Beyman, an experienced senior advisor, joins with over four decades of expertise in the industry.

news.headline: BofA AI patents increase by 94% since 2022, with nearly 1,100 AI patents in portfolio. Bank commits to tech innovation.
news.summary: Bank of America, with headquarters in Charlotte, N.C., London, and Hong Kong, possesses an extensive patent portfolio featuring close to 1,100 patents related to AI and machine learning technologies. The company's focus on leveraging advanced tools and solutions to cater to the requirements of its clients and employees underscores its dedication to innovation and progress.

news.headline: CIA Chef Genevieve Meli releasing book "Baking an Impact" promoting sustainable baking practices.
news.summary: A recently released cookbook titled "Baking an Impact: Small Changes for More Sustainable Baking" is highlighting recipes that promote smart and eco-friendly baking practices. The book, authored by Chef Genevieve Meli from the Culinary Institute of America (CIA), features a foreword by a well-known chef. The cookbook was launched on October 23, 2024, in Hyde Park, New York. It offers innovative recipes aimed at encouraging sustainable baking, with a focus on making small yet meaningful changes. This initiative by Chef Genevieve Meli showcases a collection of recipes that prioritize sustainability in baking, emphasizing the importance of adopting eco-conscious practices in the culinary world.

news.headline: Meta is seeing a loss of developers as Snap gains traction in AR, in a growing rivalry.
Hyperscience wins 2024 Deep Analysis Innovation Award for Hypercell for GenAI, recognized for second year in a row.
news.summary: Hyperscience, a company specializing in hyperautomation and enterprise AI infrastructure software, has received the Innovation Award from Deep Analysis for the second year in a row. This award highlights the recognition of Hyperscience for its Hypercell for GenAI solution, which aims to advance the back office into the GenAI era. The solution involves enhancing Large Language Models (LLMs) by integrating ground truth documents at the heart of the enterprise. This prestigious acknowledgment underscores Hyperscience's continued commitment to pioneering advancements in the field.

news.headline: Skyhigh Security expands global cloud infrastructure to enhance data security with robust infrastructure.
news.summary: Skyhigh Security, a prominent player in data-driven cloud services, has recently announced a substantial increase in its worldwide cloud infrastructure presence.

news.headline: Lattice Semiconductor reveals lineup for Developers Conference on Dec 10-11, 2024 with keynote speakers from Dell, Microsoft, SICK, and Teledyne FLIR, featuring FPGA technology demos.
news.summary: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC), a key player in low power programmable solutions, unveiled the complete schedule and roster of speakers for the Lattice Developers Conference set to take place on December 10-11, 2024. This hybrid event will include keynote presentations from prominent companies such as Dell, Microsoft, SICK, and Teledyne FLIR, along with interactive breakout sessions led by Lattice experts and industry professionals. Attendees can look forward to a diverse range of FPGA-based technology displays and demonstrations during the conference, which aims to foster collaboration among ecosystem partners.

news.headline: Fidelity Payment Services and Cardknox rebrand as Sola, Michael Reed appointed CEO, aiming for industry leadership.
news.summary: In New York, Fidelity Payment Services and Cardknox have unveiled a unified brand identity and company name, Sola. This rebrand highlights Sola's role as a comprehensive payments platform integrating the features of a payments provider and gateway for efficient solutions. The company has also appointed Michael Reed as CEO to enhance its position in the payments sector. This move aims to provide enhanced value to customers through seamless and scalable payment services.

news.headline: Adden Energy secures $15M to enhance EV accessibility with lithium-metal solid-state batteries.
news.summary: A company based in Waltham, Massachusetts, has developed lithium-metal solid-state battery technology to address the challenges hindering Electric Vehicle (EV) adoption. These batteries offer solutions to the current issues faced by consumers, including slow-charging, short lifetimes, and safety concerns. By scaling production of this technology, the company aims to accelerate the transition to EVs and combat climate change effectively. This breakthrough in battery technology shows promise in revolutionizing the EV industry, with potential significant impacts on environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Kipi.ai launches Marketing Mix Modeling & Analytics App on Snowflake AI Data Cloud, empowering marketers with data precision.
news.summary: Houston-based company Kipi.ai has announced the launch of its Marketing Mix Modeling and Analytics App on the Snowflake AI Data Cloud platform. Kipi.ai has been recognized as a reliable services partner in Snowflake's recent report titled Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025. The report highlights how leading marketers are leveraging AI, privacy, and data gravity to enhance their strategies. Kipi.ai's app offers a complete solution for marketers to enhance their campaigns with precise data analysis. Through the Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) App, Snowflake customers can now optimize their marketing efforts effectively.

news.headline: DAT iQ's freight transaction data surpasses $1 trillion, solidifying its status as a top industry dataset.
news.summary: DAT Freight & Analytics, based in Kansas City, has revealed that its DAT iQ platform has surpassed $1 trillion in freight transactions analyzed. This milestone solidifies the platform's status as the leading dataset for predicting and comparing pricing in the truckload, less-than-truckload, and intermodal sectors. The platform utilizes invoices from shippers and brokers, evaluating anonymized transactions to offer insights for freight brokers, shippers, and carriers to better grasp and predict market trends and prices.

news.headline: iConnections to host Global Alts Asia event in Singapore with 60+ speakers on Nov 11-13, connecting investors and managers.
news.summary: iConnections, a top platform connecting the investment management sector, will hold the Global Alts Asia event for the third straight year. The event, happening from 11-13 November at Marina Bay Sands in Singapore, will gather a remarkable lineup of over 60 speakers, including key allocators, fund managers, and industry experts from across the globe. This event has become highly anticipated, offering networking and knowledge-sharing opportunities for attendees.

news.headline: FireMon releases Asset Manager 5.1 boosting cloud discovery, integrates with ServiceNow. Major enhancements from May 5.0 release.
news.summary: In Lenexa, Kansas, FireMon, a top provider of network security policy management, has released FireMon Asset Manager 5.1. This update, following Version 5.0 from May, offers improved features, with a key integration with ServiceNow standing out. The new version is now accessible on the ServiceNow store as a plug-in. FireMon continues to offer visibility, control, agility, and automation to enterprise cloud and hybrid network infrastructure. The company aims to enhance network security and management capabilities for businesses.

news.headline: Cofense introduces AI spam reduction to PDR platform to enhance phishing defense, reducing workload for SOC analysts.
news.summary: In Leesburg, Virginia, a leading provider of intelligence-driven phishing defense solutions, Cofense®, has introduced new AI-powered spam reduction features to its Phishing Detection and Response (PDR) platform. This advancement aims to decrease workload for SOC analysts, allowing them to focus on authentic threats that pose potential harm to an organization's revenue or reputation. With phishing attacks evolving, there is a growing need for tools that not only enhance efficiency but also provide important assistance to security teams.

news.headline: Forex broker tastyfx integrates with TradingView, a top charting platform for traders.
news.summary: The Chicago-based company tastyfx revealed today its integration with TradingView, the top charting platform for traders.

news.headline: Anzu Partners hires Joey Clark as Principal & Senior VP of Capital Solutions to enhance capital strategies.
news.summary: Joey Clark recently became a Principal and Senior Vice President of Capital Solutions at Anzu Partners in Atlanta, Boston, San Diego, Tampa, and Washington. In this role, he will assist in developing capital strategies for funds managed by Anzu.

news.headline: Enterprise Connect 2025 introduces new conference program in San Francisco, aimed at guiding IT professionals through technology migration and digital transformation in AI-powered future.
news.summary: Today, Enterprise Connect has launched its 2025 conference program in San Francisco, emphasizing the theme "Charting Your Course." With a focus on empowering IT decision-makers, the conference aims to provide strategies and tools for leading technology migration and digital transformation in an AI-driven future. The event includes a three-day expo and four days of conference sessions, offering valuable insights to attendees.

news.headline: Fueltrax offers smart financing option for vessel operators, partnering to improve fuel monitoring systems.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, Fueltrax has recently partnered with a financing company to help vessel operators reduce costs and emissions by utilizing fuel monitoring systems more easily. The collaboration aims to streamline the process for operators and make it more accessible. This partnership is expected to significantly benefit vessel operators by providing them with the means to enhance cost-efficiency and reduce emissions through the utilization of fuel monitoring systems.

news.headline: Global VR market valued at USD 15.9 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 38.0 billion by 2029 with 19.1% CAGR.
news.summary: The latest report on the global virtual reality market indicates that it was valued at USD 15.9 billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach USD 38.0 billion by 2029, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.1%. The report categorizes the market based on technology into non-immersive, semi-immersive, and fully immersive experiences. Various offerings, such as head-mounted devices, gesture tracking devices, and projectors & display walls, are also considered. The market analysis includes a breakdown by application and region. This data has been sourced from a report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection.

news.headline: MicroStrategy named leader for 2nd year in Snowflake's report. Also honored as EMEA Data Cloud Product Acceleration Partner.
news.summary: MicroStrategy® Incorporated, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MSTR and known for its AI-powered business intelligence solutions, has achieved recognition for the second year in a row in Snowflake’s annual report titled "The Modern Marketing Data Stack 2025." This report highlights MicroStrategy as a leader in the industry. Along with this recognition, on October 9, MicroStrategy was also awarded the title of EMEA Data Cloud Product Acceleration Partner of the Year by Snowflake. This acknowledgment emphasizes the company's strong presence and contribution in the evolving landscape of AI, privacy, and data management.

news.headline: Anheuser-Busch partners with Bud Light, NFL to support Folds of Honor on National First Responders Day, with local team activations and in-game scholarship presentations.
news.summary: In New York on October 23, 2024, Bud Light and the NFL announced plans to recognize first responders and their families through various initiatives. These include local team events, in-game scholarship awards, and the creation of content showcasing the real-life stories of scholarship recipients. The collaboration aims to highlight the contributions of these heroes and pay tribute to their dedication. Fans can expect meaningful activations that honor these individuals as part of a long-standing tradition of support from Bud Light and the NFL.
